[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A shirtless man is standing outdoors on a beach with large bold text overlaid across his torso.

The main subject is a shirtless adult man standing with his feet apart and arms at his sides, facing the camera, wearing dark sunglasses. His body is prominently centered in the frame.

The setting appears to be a sunny outdoor beach with sand in the foreground and a bright blue sky above, with the horizon out of view and light clouds in the distance.

Visual details include a low, straight-on camera angle that emphasizes his upper body. Bright daylight illuminates his skin, creating clear highlights and shadows. The overlaid text is in bold, uppercase white letters with a slight shadow, centered over his chest and abdomen. The text reads: BANG JANGAN KIRIM STIKER ANEHZ YA NTIAR WA KU DI CEK MAMA

No important visible text detected besides the overlaid sentence.

The image shows a man standing on a beach in bright daylight with large warning-style text over his torso. The overall composition centers his body while the beach sky and sand form the background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
